item.title: Terrifying!
item.description: Imagine how many pointless, soulless middlemen would be out of jobs if we had Universal Healthcare!!! WON'T SOMEONE PLEASE THINK OF THE BILLIONAIRES!
item.dc:creator: jansenart

item.title: Elizabeth Cosplay (Bioshock Infinite) by LittleLuckyCosplay
item.description:
I usually decide to cosplay a character by doing a makeup test first and seeing if the likeness is good enough (apologies for the Instagram text and sticker, I pulled this from my stories archives and didn’t have it saved anywhere else)
I also tend to favor cosplays that are weathered or lived in because it helps take away from that squeaky clean costume feel
I 3D printed both cameos to have options and painted with simple acrylics/sealed with a gloss coat. Went with the cage only because the gold matched the outfit better (in game it’s bird 100%)
Plus some bonus memes bc that’s my fave part of cosplay
item.dc:creator: LittleLuckyCosplay

item.title: Misirlou (Dick Dale)
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/k37zWR2ykm8 Now that I have your attention
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t-GtC-pHUFo (1963) Music owes so much to this man. Dick Dale and Leo Fender, Freddy Tavares are the pioneers of Fender equipment in the 1950s. Leo Fender was like a second father to Dick as when they met in the 1950s they collaborated on Loud Sound and much of the Fender Equipment such as Amps, Speakers, Transformers as well as Guitars, Strat Guitar, and more
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lRH_70_Foow (1996) He killed it for so long.
Dagoth Ur: "Come to me openly, and not by stealth." Nerevarine: "Vaya Con Dios."
item.dc:creator: BeastofKnowledge

item.title: 5/? Betty Boop
item.description: “Boop-Oop-a-Doop!” 5/? ❤️ Betty Boop I am doing a costume a day for the entire month and I am raising money for charity while doing so! Read more about it here :) https://imgur.com/gallery/see-y-all-tomorrow-GJKtKLD

item.title: Sadistic Pedophile Activity? Seems to be TRUTH
item.description:
This should be fully discussed and shown to the world. If true, this is a prime example of a Depraved Sadist Pedophile. He should never be allowed to run again. America deserves better. nsfw mature for sensitive trump minions
His ONLY FUTURE........Decades of Toxic Karma coming due. He isn't man enough to pay the bill. LOCK HIM UP..............nsfw mature for sensitive trump minions

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
whatever that means.. greetings online friends
well yeah
i don't really like the color purple but that looks cool i guess
(tom petty / bob dylan) ... there are young folk here
have
final destination
gotta love gas station boner pills
a lot of work then you don't see the results
as is tradition
good times
honestly, Radio Shack
wow i found a Trey meme. had to use it
mmm hmm
indeed
yeah i'm not calling that number
why is someone handling one??!!
working on my bog body
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Gender neutral bathroom
item.description: Take a tour of a gender neutral bathroom in a public school from the perspective of a student. I couldn’t find this for a comment so I’m reposting it. Most Viral for a repost? Who would have guessed?
item.dc:creator: SheriffJackCarter

item.title: Milton's Stapler
item.description:
As a Floridian...we prepare for another hurricane to strike next week... this one will impact my area far more than Helene did.
Regardless it looks like it's gonna affect the whole state. (Prayers for those in the Big Bend area still recovering from Helene)
My coping mechanisms are memes and puppers. But the name of the storm.... Milton... and my brain goes straight to Office Space.
I know it's dumb... but it made me laugh a little as I prep to go to the store.
Louie tax
item.dc:creator: Flutterbye82

item.title: Images of Note: a wee fire?
item.description:
Americans will never understand
mood
Hey Abbie, what's it like living in Scotland?
FUCK!
:)
Egg breaker
BALL REMOVAL
Can we just talk about how a Former President is making money from Sales of Bibles that contain government documents as part of them *and* that Oklahoma is going to be buying them as part of compulsory Bible classes?
Yeah *drinks whisky*
Why the fuck is the US offering University places for Sports Prowess?
I DIDN'T *sobs*
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
